mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_method ( user_id, card_id, custom_card_company, card_name) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{cardId}, #{customCardCompany}, #{cardName} )
mapper.select: SELECT payment_id, user_id, card_id, custom_card_company, card_name, is_active FROM payment_method WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM add_subscription WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
